response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the intro montage (00:00-01:21.900) as non-vocal. 2. Identified the song starting at 01:21.901 as 'HINOTORI' by Takanashi Kiara, with Ninomae Ina'nis as a dancer. 3. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for 'HINOTORI' and verified them against the audio. 4. Created scene objects, provided full lyrics, and formatted the JSON according to the schema.
response.global_summary: The video captures a live performance at the 'Drawn to Dawn' concert featuring Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis. The performance features Takanashi Kiara singing her original song 'HINOTORI', while Ninomae Ina'nis performs choreography on stage alongside her. The first part of the video consists of a pre-concert intro montage and crowd shots.

scenes.description: The video starts with an intro sequence including crowd shots and a 'Drawn to Dawn' concert title screen. No vocal music is playing.
Takanashi Kiara performs her original song 'HINOTORI', with Ninomae Ina'nis accompanying with dance. The stage features intense red lighting and particle effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
瞬く星のゆりかご 欠けた台詞を 繋ぎ合わせた memory
聖なる従者が伝う 神話の理 祈りに耳を済ませ
Tell me, I can hear it clearly Tell me, 声なき声に
荒ぶる鼓動は 弱さを焦がす
[Chorus]
炎降り注ぐ空に 身をやつして
乱れ咲く赤は 紅化粧
数多 重なる試練も生き抜いてみせる
I will live to keep on fighting 'til the dawn
[Verse 2]
たとえば 先の見えない零の境界
迷い込んだとしても
何度も繰り返される 孤高の終焉
そこに残った answer
[Pre-Chorus]
Don't break, I will never give up
Don't break, 羽が朽ちても
消せない強さは時の導
[Chorus]
炎降り注ぐ空に 身をやつして
乱れ咲く赤は 紅化粧
数多 重なる試練も生き抜いてみせる
Lies and truth, come to light at the break of day
[Bridge]
I've been trying to find my destiny
But they keep pushing and pulling me astray
If I go wrong, what awaits me in the dark?
Could you tell me please, where I need to go?
Tell me, I can hear it clearly
Tell me, 声なき声に
漲る決意は 暗闇を晴らす
[Chorus]
炎降り注ぐ空に 身をやつして
乱れ咲く赤は 紅化粧
数多 重なる試練も生き抜いてみせる
Blazing flames, show me the path to luminance
[Post-Chorus]
And in the next life too, I promise I will find you
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A cradle of twinkling stars, connecting the missing lines of memory
The holy attendant tells the logic of the myth, listen to the prayer
Tell me, I can hear it clearly
Tell me, to the voiceless voice
The raging heartbeat burns the weakness
[Chorus]
Burning flames raining down in the sky, disguising myself
The red blooming wildly is the crimson makeup
I will survive and show you through the numerous trials overlapping
I will live to keep on fighting 'til the dawn
[Verse 2]
For example, at the boundary of zero where the end cannot be seen
Even if I wander in
Repeatedly, the lonely end that repeats
The answer left there
[Pre-Chorus]
Don't break, I will never give up
Don't break, even if my feathers rot
The unerasable strength is the guide of time
[Chorus]
Burning flames raining down in the sky, disguising myself
The red blooming wildly is the crimson makeup
I will survive and show you through the numerous trials overlapping
Lies and truth, come to light at the break of day
[Bridge]
I've been trying to find my destiny
But they keep pushing and pulling me astray
If I go wrong, what awaits me in the dark?
Could you tell me please, where I need to go?
Tell me, I can hear it clearly
Tell me, to the voiceless voice
The surging determination clears the darkness
[Chorus]
Burning flames raining down in the sky, disguising myself
The red blooming wildly is the crimson makeup
I will survive and show you through the numerous trials overlapping
Blazing flames, show me the path to luminance
[Post-Chorus]
And in the next life too, I promise I will find you
